hero.tagline: Programming is not about language; it is about logic, architecture, and impact.

about.label: Presentation
about.title: About Me
about.p1: Developer focused on backend engineering, RESTful API architecture, and building robust web applications. Experienced with Java, Node.js, and Python, prioritizing maintainability and clean software practices.
about.p2: I believe great solutions come from combining clear logic, well-thought architecture, and clean code. I continuously strive to improve delivery quality and tackle complex technical challenges.
